QUESTION:
What will be the output of the following code?

```python
x = 5
if x > 10:
    print('Greater than 10')
elif x > 3:
    print('Greater than 3')
else:
    print('3 or less')
```

Options:
  A. Greater than 10
  B. Greater than 3
  C. 3 or less
  D. No output
